assertion_results.text: Each task file contains all required template sections: Repository, Description, at least one of Files to Modify or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, Test Requirements
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain Repository, Description, Files to Modify and/or Files to Create, Implementation Notes, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections. Task 1 has both Files to Modify and Files to Create. Tasks 2-5 all contain the required sections with additional sections like Reuse Candidates, Dependencies, and Verification Commands.

assertion_results.text: Task count is between 3 and 10 inclusive — a standard feature produces a reasonable number of implementation tasks
All tasks reference repository 'trustify-backend' — the feature targets a single repo
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' as their first section content.

assertion_results.text: Task dependencies form a DAG — no circular dependencies
assertion_results.evidence: Dependency chain: Task 1 (none) -> Task 2 (depends on Task 1) -> Task 3 (depends on Task 2) -> Task 4 (depends on Task 3), Task 5 (depends on Tasks 3 and 4). This is a valid DAG with no cycles.

assertion_results.text: Every task's Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths that are plausible within the repo-backend.md repository structure
assertion_results.evidence: All paths reference directories present in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/ (exists), modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs (exists), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (exists), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (exists), tests/api/ (exists), server/src/main.rs (exists). New files are created within existing directory structures.

assertion_results.text: Impact map lists concrete, specific changes (not vague or abstract descriptions)
assertion_results.evidence: Impact map lists 6 specific changes including: 'Add AdvisorySeveritySummary model struct to represent aggregated severity counts', 'Add severity aggregation query method to AdvisoryService that counts unique advisories per severity for a given SBOM', 'Add GET /api/v2/sbom/{id}/advisory-summary endpoint with 5-minute cache and optional threshold query param', 'Add cache invalidation hook in advisory ingestion pipeline', 'Add integration tests', 'Update REST API documentation'.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains a Repository section with a single repository name (not multiple repos per task)
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files have '## Repository\ntrustify-backend' as a standalone section with a single repo name. No task lists multiple repositories.

assertion_results.text: Every generated task description contains Description, Acceptance Criteria, and Test Requirements sections as required by the handoff contract in task-description-template.md
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 task files contain '## Description' (with explanatory text), '## Acceptance Criteria' (with checkbox items), and '## Test Requirements' (with checkbox items).

assertion_results.text: File paths in Files to Modify and Files to Create reference paths from the repo-backend.md mock repository structure manifest, not invented paths
assertion_results.evidence: All file paths reference directories present in repo-backend.md: modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/ (exists), modules/fundamental/src/advisory/service/advisory.rs (exists), modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/ (exists), modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs (exists), tests/api/ (exists), server/src/main.rs (exists). New files are created within existing directory structures.

assertion_results.text: Implementation Notes in every task reference specific file paths and code patterns from the repository, not abstract or generic guidance
assertion_results.evidence: All 5 tasks reference specific file paths and patterns: Task 1 references modules/fundamental/src/advisory/model/summary.rs (AdvisorySummary pattern); Task 2 references entity/src/sbom_advisory.rs and common/src/db/query.rs; Task 3 references modules/fundamental/src/sbom/endpoints/get.rs handler pattern; Task 4 references modules/ingestor/src/graph/advisory/mod.rs; Task 5 references tests/api/sbom.rs assertion patterns.
